steps.name: When  I turn on test mode in "Palace Bookshelf" library
And  I add "A1QA Test Library" account by the logo
Then  Account "A1QA Test Library" is present on Accounts screen
And  I search for "The Woman in White" and save bookName as 'bookNameInfo'
steps.statusMessage: Search modal is not present. Error (if present) -
steps.statusTrace:
java.lang.AssertionError: Search modal is not present. Error (if present) - 
	at org.junit.Assert.fail(Assert.java:89)
	at org.junit.Assert.assertTrue(Assert.java:42)

	at ✽.I search for "The Woman in White" and save bookName as 'bookNameInfo'(file:///home/runner/work/mobile-integration-tests/mobile-integration-tests/src/test/java/features/BookDetailView.feature:288)

steps.name: And  Open EBOOK book with GET action button and 'bookNameInfo' bookName on catalog books screen and save book as 'bookInfo'
Then  Book 'bookInfo' is opened on book details screen
And  Related books section is displayed on book details screen
And  There is a list of related books on book details screen
And  More button in related books section is available on book details screen
